customSubGoals: Run a launch review that surfaces risks early
onboarding.goalDetail: Run a launch review that surfaces risks early

lifePriority.title: Lead with clarity
lifePriority.description: Lead product work with clarity and responsibility, making decisions that help the team move forward without becoming reactive.

baseline.preparationOnlyContext: Daily preparation with the full calendar schedule and durations, without priority ranking.

sub_goals: Run a launch review that surfaces risks early

goal_state.goal_title: Run a launch review that surfaces risks early
goal_state.objective: Run a launch review that surfaces risks early

raw_data.sleep_summary: 7.1 hours slept with good continuity; sleep quality 82/100 and enough morning readiness for focused planning.
raw_data.activity_summary: 2300 steps and 18 active minutes before work.
raw_data.stress_summary: Stress is manageable, with meeting pressure likely to rise near the launch review.

onboarding_values.label: Clarity
onboarding_values.definition: making the next decision visible enough for the team to act

onboarding_values.label: Responsibility
onboarding_values.definition: owning the risk without carrying every task alone

onboarding_values.label: Calm Leadership
onboarding_values.definition: creating steadiness when the room gets noisy

raw_data.stress_summary: Stress is moderate after shift load and an upcoming exam, but structure can help attention settle.
